zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith von Zähringen於1090年出生在巴登阿赤 福包格亞林根時，她的父親Berthold II von Zähringen34歲，母親Agnes von Rheinfelden26歲。她於大約1110年與Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen在德國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1150年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith von Zähringen于1090年出生在巴登阿赤 福包格亞林根时，她的父亲Berthold II von Zähringen34岁，母亲Agnes von Rheinfelden26岁。她于大约1110年与Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen在德国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1150年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith von Zähringen was born in 1090, in Zähringen, Amt Freiburg, Baden, her father, Berthold II von Zähringen, was 34 and her mother, Agnes von Rheinfelden, was 26. She married Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen about 1110, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1150, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith von Zähringen est née en 1090, à Zähringen, Amt Freiburg, Baden, son père, Berthold II von Zähringen, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Rheinfelden, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen environ 1110, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1150, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith von Zähringen 1090 in Zähringen, Amt Freiburg, Baden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Berthold II von Zähringen 34 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Rheinfelden 26. Sie hat um 1110 in Deutschland Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1150 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Zähringen è nata il nel 1090 nel Zähringen, Amt Freiburg, Baden, sua padre, Berthold II von Zähringen, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Rheinfelden, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen circa 1110, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1150, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith von Zähringenが1090年にバデンアムト フレイブルグズahリンジェンで生まれた時，父Berthold II von Zähringenは34歳，母Agnes von Rheinfeldenは26歳であった。約1110年にドイツでUlrich II. Graf von Gammertingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1150年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith von Zähringen(이)가 1090년 바든 아트 프레이버그 즈ah링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Berthold II von Zähringen(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Rheinfelden(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1110년 독일에서 Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1150년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith von Zähringen nasceu em 1090, em Zähringen, Amt Freiburg, Baden, seu pai, Berthold II von Zähringen, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Rheinfelden, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen aproximadamente 1110, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1150, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith von Zähringen родилась в 1090 г. в местности зaхринген, амт фрибург, баден, её отцу по имени Berthold II von Zähringen было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Rheinfelden, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen около 1110 г. в местности Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1150 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith von Zähringen nació en 1090, en Zähringen, Amt Freiburg, Baden, su papá, Berthold II von Zähringen, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes von Rheinfelden, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Ulrich II. Graf von Gammertingen aproximadamente 1110, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1150, a la edad de 60 años.
